reviews.comment:
Puede que opine asi porque me volví fanático  del ACA, está muy lindo, detrás del comedor hay unas mesas con bancos de material y una parrilla por si alguien quiere hacer un asadito. Personal siempre dispuesto, muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
I might feel this way because I've become a big fan of the ACA; it's really nice. Behind the dining area, there are tables with benches and a grill if anyone wants to have a barbecue. The staff is always helpful and provides excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dVl1Mmh3RRAB

Good place to stop for fuel and something to eat, good service, clean bathrooms, well-served food

reviews.comment:
Día domingo 22 de Enero de 2017. Cola interminable,  8 surtidores y.....  1 solo empleado despachando combustible,  a las 11 de la mañana y en pleno recambio turístico!!

(Translated by Google)
Sunday, January 22, 2017. Endless queue, 8 pumps and... only 1 employee dispensing fuel, at 11 am and in the middle of the tourist season!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBOTkzRDlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen precio en el minimarket y buena atención en el despacho de combustible. Baños ahí nomás (nada brillante) sino sería un 5 estrellas

(Translated by Google)
Good prices at the convenience store and good service at the gas station. The bathrooms are just okay (nothing fancy), otherwise it would be a 5-star hotel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRdTZ5MmZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Se trabaja intensamente por lo que no brindan la mejor atención. En el mostrador noté que se solicitó ayuda varias veces y la empleada no fue atenta.

(Translated by Google)
They work very hard, so they don't provide the best service. At the counter, I noticed that I asked for help several times, and the employee wasn't attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBam9TYnR3RRAB

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. Grill, clean restrooms, a very good rest stop along the way
